title: Ruth Williams Bayview Opera House - Perfect Venue Marketplace
content: It was a last-minute event, enough lead time to gather only a small crowd. But the RWOH staff treated it as a big deal. Every guest was made to feel special.

title: SF's oldest theater turned itself into a performance powerhouse
content: Under new leadership, the 137-year-old Ruth Williams Bayview Opera House transformed itself from community center to performance powerhouse.

title: Ruth Williams Opera House
content: ## The Historic Bayview Opera House. ## THE Performing. ## Arts And. ## Support the Opera House. The Bayview Opera House Board of Directors invites the public to attend its upcoming board meeting via Zoom. **Calling All Artists!** The Ruth Williams Bayview Opera House is hosting an open call for artists. The theme, **Art is Resistance:** Preserving the Past, Creating the Future is a community-driven public art initiative that explores how creativity serves as a tool for cultural preservation, placemaking, and civic imagination. Rooted in Bayview-Hunters Point, the project invites artists and residents to examine the stories, traditions, and shared lived experiences that define the neighborhood while envisioning the future they want to create together. Prepare for an unforgettable evening of live reggae music in San Francisco as Junior Toots brings the powerful legacy of Toots and the Maytals to life at the historic Bayview Opera House. This event promises to be more than just a concert; it’s a vibrant celebration of roots reggae, Caribbean culture, and conscious music in the heart of Bayview.
